description: Migration: Update `document_associations` entity_type CHECK constraint to include 'team' (Citus-compliant, NOT VALID, transaction: false)
Add 'team' to EntityType union in `packages/media/src/lib/avatarUtils.ts`
Add 'team' to EntityType union in `packages/users/src/lib/avatarUtils.ts`
Add 'team' to EntityType union in `packages/formatting/src/avatarUtils.ts`
Add 'team' to EntityType union in `packages/ui/src/components/EntityImageUpload.tsx`
Add `getTeamAvatarUrl()` helper function in `packages/media/src/lib/avatarUtils.ts`
Create `TeamAvatar` component in `packages/ui/src/components/TeamAvatar.tsx` (thin wrapper around EntityAvatar, following UserAvatar pattern)
Create `uploadTeamAvatar` server action in `packages/teams/src/actions/team-actions/avatarActions.ts` using `uploadEntityImage('team', ...)`
Create `deleteTeamAvatar` server action in `packages/teams/src/actions/team-actions/avatarActions.ts` using `deleteEntityImage('team', ...)`
Create `getTeamAvatarUrlAction` server action in teams package
Create `getTeamAvatarUrlsBatchAction` server action in teams package for batch avatar URL fetching
Export avatar actions from `packages/teams/src/actions/team-actions/index.ts`
Add `@alga-psa/media`, `@alga-psa/auth`, `swr` dependencies to `packages/teams/package.json`
Create `useTeamAvatar` SWR hook in `packages/teams/src/hooks/useTeamAvatar.ts` (following useUserAvatar pattern)
Export `useTeamAvatar` from `packages/teams/src/hooks/index.ts`
Add team avatar upload UI to `TeamDetails.tsx` using EntityImageUpload (above team name field)
Team avatar upload refreshes avatar display after successful upload
Create `OrgChartNode` custom ReactFlow node component (card with UserAvatar, name, role, inactive badge)
Create `OrgChart` container component with ReactFlow canvas and ReactFlowProvider
OrgChart: build tree from `reports_to` relationships and compute top-down hierarchical node positions
OrgChart: create smoothstep edges between parent and child nodes
OrgChart: `fitView` on initial render with zoom/pan enabled, nodes not draggable
OrgChart: clicking a node opens UserDetails drawer via `useDrawer`
OrgChart: batch-fetch user avatar URLs for all displayed nodes
OrgChart: ReactFlow imported dynamically with `{ ssr: false }` to prevent SSR errors
UserManagement: merge portal-type and list/structure ViewSwitchers into one row in CardHeader
UserManagement: remove duplicate list/org ViewSwitcher from list view toolbar (lines 668-673)
UserManagement: remove duplicate list/org ViewSwitcher from org view header (lines 696-706)
UserManagement: rename 'Org Chart' label to 'Structure' in userViewOptions
UserManagement: replace inline nested-list org chart rendering with new OrgChart component
UserManagement: remove old `buildOrgTree` and `renderOrgNode` functions (logic moved to OrgChart)
OrgChart and Structure toggle hidden when `teams-v2` flag is off
`UserAndTeamPicker`: replace hardcoded gray circle + TeamIcon with `TeamAvatar` component
`UserAndTeamPicker`: add optional `getTeamAvatarUrlsBatch` prop
`UserAndTeamPicker`: batch-fetch team avatar URLs when dropdown opens or teams change
Create `MultiUserAndTeamPicker` component in `packages/ui/src/components/MultiUserAndTeamPicker.tsx` (copy of MultiUserPicker with team logic + TeamAvatar)
`MultiUserAndTeamPicker`: replace all hardcoded TeamIcon instances with `TeamAvatar` component
`MultiUserAndTeamPicker`: add `getTeamAvatarUrlsBatch` prop and batch-fetch team avatar URLs
Remove team props and team logic from original `MultiUserPicker` (teams, teamFilterFn, team rendering, stale team cleanup)
Call sites swap `MultiUserPicker` → `MultiUserAndTeamPicker` when `teams-v2` flag is enabled
Thread `getTeamAvatarUrlsBatchAction` through `MultiUserAndTeamPicker` call sites (ticket detail, task detail, ticket filter)
Pickers show colored initials (EntityAvatar fallback) when no team avatar URL is available — no more generic gray circles
